titleStmt.title: SII 18.350: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 350. (B.K. No. 125 of 1933-34.) BIJAPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Second pillar at the south entrance to the Ark-killah.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1115, (current) Paridhāvi, Āshāḍha Pūrṇimā, Saturday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1192, June 27, Saturday. The saṁkrānti occurred on the previous Friday.
It records a grant of land for the worship and offerings of flowers to god Narasiṁhadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Written in continuation of B.K. No. 124 of 1933-34.
div.p:
śrīgōyiṁdēśvaradēvara sthānadacāryyaru hiriyasōvarāśijī
yaru cikkasōvarāśijīyaruṁ jīyaruṁ heggaḍemallayyanantuĀmā lvaruMistake for nālvaru.
baṇaveya baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍalu mādiyaṇanāyakana brahmapuriyiṁ
teṁkalu śrīnarasiṁhadēvara muṁdina tōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu haḷḷadiṁ baḍagalu taṁma tōṁṭava
śrī narasiṁhadēvargge sakavarṣada 1115 neya paridhāvisaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍhada puṁṇami
vaḍḍavāra dakṣiṇāyanasaṁkrāṁtiya parvvadalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru Ā dēva
ru Ā tōṇṭavaṁ mālagāṟa lakhaṇaṁge dēvara
dhūpakke varṣa ttāru paṇaṁ . divasavahaṁ 12 kaṭṭuhūvaṁ tettu hiṭṭukāṟarā
ṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.350 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
